overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot depicting students in wizard robes gathered in a grassy castle courtyard. The scene features medieval Gothic architecture with red and gold banners, stone towers, and festive bunting strung between spires under a partly cloudy sky. Characters engage in idle conversation while one student holds a broomstick.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with students socializing near fortification walls

fortified stone wall with crenellated top connecting the towers
strings of triangular pennant flags hanging between the towers
gothic spires of the main castle visible in the background
well-maintained green grass covering the ground

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval castle courtyard with Gothic architecture. Students in dark wizard robes gather in small groups on the grass, with one student prominently holding a broomstick while conversing with peers. Red and gold banners hang from the stone fortification walls while festive pennant bunting stretches between the towers under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, cinematic view of a medieval castle courtyard where students in wizard robes gather amidst festive decorations. It begins with a wide perspective of the Gothic architecture, focusing on the stone fortification walls adorned with red and gold banners. As the camera lingers, the scene highlights students in dark robes conversing in small groups on the grass, including one student prominently holding a broomstick. The view then expands to encompass the festive pennant bunting stretching between the towering spires under a partly cloudy sky.
